summary: Verified Age/Gender (Yaş/Cinsiyet) store filtering bug fix. Both /api/live/analytics and /api/live/analytics/stores endpoints now correctly filter data by store's analytics_camera_ids. Backend tests 100% pass (9/9), Frontend UI working correctly.

issues: Console warning: 'The width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0' - Recharts container sizing issue on initial load (cosmetic, does not affect functionality)

critical_code_review_comments: Bug fix verified: /api/live/analytics now correctly uses allowed_camera_ids parameter to filter by store's analytics_camera_ids
Bug fix verified: /api/live/analytics/stores now correctly handles parse_analytics_xml return format {'cameras': [...]} instead of flat events list

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Analytics page loads, displays per-store data correctly, filter dropdown works)

seed_data_creation: Used existing stores: perpa (ID: be0fd342-c923-42f6-a2e8-676dc093d665) and elsan (ID: 64d4b1db-7017-44ad-a901-f4ff8f64e8b7)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Age/Gender store filtering is now working correctly. Perpa store shows 10 detections, Elsan shows 2 detections. The /api/live/analytics endpoint accepts store_ids parameter and filters by analytics_camera_ids. The /api/live/analytics/stores endpoint returns per-store analytics data.

bug_verification.original_issue: Age/Gender (Yaş/Cinsiyet) data was not filtered by store - showing all VMS data instead of only the cameras assigned to each store
fix_applied: 1. /api/live/analytics now filters by store's analytics_camera_ids when store_ids parameter is provided
2. Fixed TypeError in /api/live/analytics/stores where parse_analytics_xml returns {'cameras': [...]} not flat events list

features_tested./api/live/analytics: PASS - Returns filtered data when store_ids provided
features_tested./api/live/analytics?store_ids=UUID: PASS - Correctly filters by store's analytics_camera_ids
features_tested./api/live/analytics/stores: PASS - Returns per-store analytics with correct detection counts
features_tested.Analytics page UI: PASS - Displays correct data per store (Perpa: 10, Elsan: 2)
features_tested.Store filter dropdown: PASS - Shows all stores and allows filtering
